name: hotel managers managing 20-50 employees tool
description: For hotel managers processing 20-50 employee shifts, inefficient scheduling causes staffing shortages. We streamline shift management instead of manual scheduling via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: inefficient shift scheduling and time-off management
